global_billboard_trail._role: PERSISTENT visual trail accumulation surface (rgb=deposited billboard color, a from deposit). diffuse multiplies it by clamp(intensity/100) (persistence; no blur), copy blits it to the post-swap write buffer (ping-pong correction so HW blending is correct), deposit additively scatters camera-facing billboard quads (SDF shapes or sprite texture) into it (drawMode:'billboards', blend:true -> Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize from xyzTex dims; each agent = 6 verts/2 triangles), blend alpha-composites it over the scaled pipeline input. Reads its own prior 'global_' output so it persists frame-to-frame (runtime double-buffers/ping-pongs; reference 04 §10.2/§10.7). Declared as a private effect texture (not a state-surface; no _xyz/_vel/_rgba suffix, no 'state') but the feedback read+write of the same 'global_' key keeps it alive.

global_xyz._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([x, y, z, alive]; for 2D systems xy in [0,1] with z near 0, for 3D attractors xyz roughly +/-40). Produced upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize). READ-ONLY here: the deposit VERTEX stage Loads pos.xyz (for the 2D/3D view transform) and pos.w (alive cull, pos.w >= 0.5). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_xyz').

global_rgba._role: PERSISTENT agent state-surface ([r, g, b, a] agent color from pointsEmit). READ-ONLY here: the deposit VERTEX stage Loads col and emits it as the billboard tint (col.rgb, col.a). isStateSurface=true (suffix '_rgba').

feedback._comment: Agent-consumer multi-pass effect with a BILLBOARD scatter (camera-facing sprite quads; hardest 3D/RENDER tier). State lives in PERSISTENT 'global_' surfaces. global_xyz/global_rgba (rgba32f) are agent state-surfaces created upstream by pointsEmit (sized stateSize x stateSize) and matched by isStateSurface (suffix '_xyz'/'_rgba'); pointsBillboardRender only READS them (deposit vertex stage). global_billboard_trail (rgba16f, full-res, private) is the visual trail feedback surface: diffuse multiplies by clamp(intensity/100) (program 'diffuse', no blur), copy blits it to the post-swap write buffer (program 'copy'), deposit additively scatters billboard quads into it (drawMode:'billboards', blend:true resolves to Blend One One, count='input' = stateSize*stateSize derived from xyzTex dims; the runtime issues DrawProcedural(Triangles, count*6) — 6 verts/2 triangles per agent), blend alpha-composites it over the scaled input into outputTex. The deposit VERTEX stage Loads agent xyz/rgba (SM4.5), culls dead/density-failing/out-of-range agents to clip (2,2,0,1), maps the agent center to clip (2D: pos.xy*2-1; 3D: rotateX/Y/Z + ortho), expands a per-particle size-varied + rotated quad (pointSize in px -> clip via 2/resolution), and emits a 0..1 spriteUV varying. The fragment stage renders an SDF shape (shapeMode 1..6), a gaussian 'soft' (7), or samples the sprite texture (shapeMode 0), tinted by agent color and scaled by depositOpacity/100. No '_iteration' uniform; no repeat. seed (typed int) is injected as a float and added inside the sin-hash.
